task: Type 'energy drink' in the search bar to enable the 'Search' button and find related products.
Navigate to the 'Diet & Sports Nutrition' subcategory under 'Health & Household' to view products related to sports nutrition.
Navigate to the 'Exercise & Fitness' section under the 'Sports & Outdoors' category to explore available products and their details.
Log into your account by entering your email and password, or create a new account if you are a new customer using the 'Create an Account' button.
